What's New In rPickle 0.4
====================================

:Release: 2026-06-26
:Version: 0.4.0

Stable v1 Release
-----------------

- ``sentinel`` support (Python 3.15+)
- Security section improved (comparison with pickle)
- ``Extension`` example refined
- 40 tests

---

.. _v0.4.1:

0.4.1 — 2026-06-26
------------------------------------

Improvements
------------

- ``Extension.__or__``, ``__ror__``, ``__ior__`` now include type checking
- Added ``from __future__ import annotations``
